def positive_dynamic_plugin_loaded_from_config_without_registry_allowlist():
    rule_id = "dynamic_plugin_loaded_from_config_without_registry_allowlist"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Plugin loaded via importlib.import_module from config without validating against an allowlist."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
